_comment: outbound-data reviewed with --llm-review (turned on by the sibling llm.js). Exercises both LLM lanes and all three recheck verdicts: data-exfiltration evaluate (bg:4 fail -> a direct finding; bg:7/bg:8 unsure -> diverted), then the add-on summary re-judges the diverted sinks (bg:7 pass -> dropped, bg:8 fail -> a finding) and the missing-english-localization-recheck item (unsure -> manual). See llm.js for the canned answers.
